classes.reasoning: This is a structured Case Report Form for capturing per-patient, per-visit data. It includes sections for vital signs, ECOG performance status, study drug dispensing, concomitant medications, PK sampling, adverse events, and PRO questionnaires. The header explicitly identifies it as 'eCRF MODULE' with form version 2.1, site ID, and patient code fields for data entry.

summary: This is an electronic Case Report Form (eCRF) module for Cycle 1 Day 1 (Baseline / First Dose) visit data capture in study BIORCE-ONC-2023-001. The form collects vital signs, ECOG performance status, study drug dispensing details, concomitant medications, pharmacokinetic sampling records, adverse events, and patient-reported outcome questionnaires (EORTC QLQ-C30 and QLQ-LC13) for individual patients at a specific clinical visit.
